nodes.name: 中華民國
nodes.summary: 中華民國是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联48种鸟类，包括凍原豆雁、青头潜鸭、花脸鸭等48种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 柬埔寨
nodes.summary: 柬埔寨是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联93种鸟类，包括栗头山鹧鸪、橙颈山鹧鸪、绿孔雀等93种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 巴基斯坦

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 領鵂鶹
nodes.summary: 領鵂鶹（Collared owlet，学名 Taenioptynx brodiei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联14个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Their preferred habitat varies from evergreen forests, forest edges, mixed deciduous-evergreen forests with oak, rhododendron and fir and open woodlands with scrub. They can be found in submontane and montane habitats varying between 1,350–2,750 meters in altitude, but they have also been seen near cultivated lands as low as 700 meters in altitude. Species in the genus Taenioptynx are secondary cavity-nesters

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is submontane and montane forests with open spaces and is distributed throughout oriental Asia. It is the smallest owl in Asia, at and

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although the collared owlet is at least concern on the IUCN Red list, its main threat is habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In a study examining the effects of fragmentation on nocturnal birds in Asia, collared owlets were never found in forest fragments smaller than 100 hectares. The authors concluded that anthropogenic pressures such as deforestation can affect even small species such as the collared owlet
